zh.lifeSummary: 當Egidia Stewart於1355年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾登東納爾德時，她的父親Robert II Stewart King of Scotland39歲，母親Queen Euphemia Ross of Scotland26歲。她於1387年與Sir William Douglas Lord Nithsdale結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1407年在英國蘇格蘭享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Egidia Stewart于1355年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾登東納爾德时，她的父亲Robert II Stewart King of Scotland39岁，母亲Queen Euphemia Ross of Scotland26岁。她于1387年与Sir William Douglas Lord Nithsdale结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1407年在英国苏格兰享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Egidia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Egidia Stewart was born in 1355, in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Robert II Stewart King of Scotland, was 39 and her mother, Queen Euphemia Ross of Scotland, was 26. She married Sir William Douglas Lord Nithsdale in 1387. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 1407, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Egidia Stewart est née en 1355, à Dundonald, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert II Stewart King of Scotland, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Queen Euphemia Ross of Scotland, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Douglas Lord Nithsdale en 1387. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1407, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Egidia Stewart 1355 in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert II Stewart King of Scotland 39 und ihre Mutter Queen Euphemia Ross of Scotland 26. Sie hat 1387 Sir William Douglas Lord Nithsdale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1407 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Egidia Stewart è nata il nel 1355 nel Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert II Stewart King of Scotland, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Queen Euphemia Ross of Scotland, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Douglas Lord Nithsdale nel 1387. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1407, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Egidia Stewartが1355年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアダンドナルドで生まれた時，父Robert II Stewart King of Scotlandは39歳，母Queen Euphemia Ross of Scotlandは26歳であった。1387年にSir William Douglas Lord Nithsdaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1407年にイギリススコットランドで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Egidia Stewart(이)가 1355년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 던도널드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert II Stewart King of Scotland(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Queen Euphemia Ross of Scotland(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1387년 Sir William Douglas Lord Nithsdale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1407년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Egidia Stewart nasceu em 1355, em Dundonald, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert II Stewart King of Scotland, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Queen Euphemia Ross of Scotland, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Douglas Lord Nithsdale em 1387. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1407, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Egidia Stewart родилась в 1355 г. в местности дундональд, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert II Stewart King of Scotland было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Queen Euphemia Ross of Scotland, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Douglas Lord Nithsdale в 1387 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1407 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Egidia Stewart nació en 1355, en Dundonald, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert II Stewart King of Scotland, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Queen Euphemia Ross of Scotland, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir William Douglas Lord Nithsdale en 1387. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1407, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años.
